title: In relation to the making of a claim by a personal representative
content:
of a deceased employee who dies before the end of the period of 
1 month beginning with the relevant date, section 31N shall apply 
with the substitution, for the words “3 months”, of the words “6 
months”. (Amended 76 of 1985 s. 9)
